backward_compatibility.rationale: Forward only — no backward compat. Re-process all puzzles. Enrichment is idempotent.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Remove aggressively per project policy: delete, don't deprecate. Git history preserves everything.

option_selection.rationale: Interleaved Priority: fixes → algorithms → reviews → sgfmill → docs. Unanimous governance approval. Reviews cover full codebase state.
